title: Ability to connect your monday.com with Azure DevOps Connector
excerpt: Azure DevOps Connector is the perfect plugin designed by appserve.ai to connect your monday.com with the Azure DevOps (ADO) platform. This app is packed with features designed to streamline your workflows and improve col…

posts.author: Megharaja (Megharaja Chandrappa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Azure DevOps Connector is the perfect plugin designed by appserve.ai to connect your monday.com with the Azure DevOps (ADO) platform. This app is packed with features designed to streamline your workflows and improve collaboration between Azure DevOps and monday.com teams.

App Features:

Automatically sync Epics, Tasks, Features, and other work items between the platform.

Easily map custom fields between Azure DevOps and monday.com boards to suit your workflow requirements.

Automatically update the status of items on both platforms as progress is made.

Easily achieve a parent-child relationship between work items on both platforms.

Create a link between successor and predecessor tasks and sync them on both platforms.

Need More Details?

Check out the complete app documentation for in-depth guidance

Get started today and unlock your full potential!

Download the app from monday marketplace

Please post your reviews, feedback, issues, and questions about the Azure DevOps Connector app here.
